title: vitex agnus-castus var. latifolia
intro: Vitex agnus-castus var. latifolia is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the Chaste Tree. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic activities. The health benefits of Vitex agnus-castus var. latifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, as well as its ability to support hormonal balance and immune system function. In herbal medicine, the plant's berries, flowers, and leaves are often used to prepare teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
